name: NewSecGap Phase 60 — BR Domain 2 CSVs: Copy, URL Backfill, Q2 Audit + ADO Guide Update
description: Bring 2 BR domain CSVs from data/outputs/ into data/outputs/br/*.final.csv with ~85%+ per-row confidence. Steps: (1) copy to final; (2) MCSB BR URL backfill; (3) Q1-A URL for backup IM-3 now_applicable_native; (4) Q1-C spot-checks (backup NS-2 PE, backup PA-7 RBAC, siterecovery IM-8 credentials); (5) Q2 new-feature audit. Also update docs/avd_task_import_guide.md with BR section — completes import guide for all 45 assessed services.
confidenceGap: 71 rows total (backup=36, siterecovery=35). Zero URL coverage. backup has 1 now_applicable_native (IM-3 Managed Identity, no HTTP source URL). backup has 15 UNCOV rows, siterecovery has 17 UNCOV rows.

Add BR section after QG PASS

csvSchema.noteUpdatePattern: Append to existing notes — do NOT replace. Pattern: '{existing} | {evidence}. Source: {url}'
csvSchema.supplementNotePattern: v2 gap: {description}. Source: {url} | Q2-{group} WebSearch June 2026 confirmed GA.

verdictTaxonomy.changeRule: Do NOT change verdict without evidence. Q1-C may flip still_not_applicable to now_applicable_native if confirmed GA.

targetFiles.note: IM-3 now_applicable_native exists but has NO http source URL — MUST be added in Q1-A. backup NS-2 Private Link: check if PE support was added (may flip).
No now_applicable_native rows. siterecovery IM-8 Run As account / service credential: check if managed identity replaced Run As (may flip).

workstreams.name: now_applicable_native URL Fix
workstreams.description: backup IM-3 Managed Identity is now_applicable_native but has no HTTP source URL. QG will FAIL without this. Must find ARM property and source URL.

workstreams.supplementCondition: Only add SUPPLEMENT row if feature is GA and maps to BR-1/BR-2/BR-3 or significantly changes IM/NS/DP coverage for these services

workstreams.action: Add BR Domain table (2 services: backup, siterecovery with data/outputs/br/*.final.csv paths) and BR AVD Copilot Prompt section. Update import totals to 45 services / ~1566 tasks.

scriptsToWrite.condition: Always required — at minimum adds HTTP source URL to backup IM-3 now_applicable_native row. Also applies any Q1-C flips.
Only write if Q2 finds at least one new GA feature mapping to BR/IM/NS/DP control

executionSteps.action: Read: CLAUDE.md, activity.log, 2 source CSVs (all rows), avd_task_import_guide.md
Python urllib HEAD-verify 2 MCSB BR baseline URLs
WebSearch Q1-A: backup IM-3 Managed Identity source URL + ARM property
WebSearch Q1-C: 3 spot-checks in parallel (backup PA-7, backup NS-2, siterecovery IM-8)
WebSearch Q2-A/B: 2 grouped new-feature searches in parallel
Write + run scripts/phase60_individual_patches.py (backup IM-3 URL patch + any Q1-C flips)
If Q2 found new GA features: write + run scripts/phase60_supplement_rows.py
Run quality gate — both must PASS (zero no_url, uncov<5)
Update docs/avd_task_import_guide.md — add BR section + copilot prompt
git add -f data/outputs/br/ scripts/phase60_*.py docs/avd_task_import_guide.md && git commit
STOP — do not start next domain or Phase 61 without user confirmation

passCriteria: Zero now_applicable_native without URL (backup IM-3 MUST have http in notes)
qualityGate.command:
python3 -c "import csv
ALLOWED={'implemented','now_applicable_native','upgraded_implemented','still_not_applicable','conditional','not_applicable_paas','not_applicable_arm'}
slugs=['backup','siterecovery']
all_ok=True
for s in slugs:
    rows=list(csv.DictReader(open(f'data/outputs/br/{s}.final.csv')))
    bad={r['verdict_2025'] for r in rows}-ALLOWED
    no_url=[r for r in rows if r['verdict_2025']=='now_applicable_native' and 'http' not in r.get('notes','')]
    uncov=[r for r in rows if 'http' not in r.get('notes','') and 'Source' not in r.get('notes','') and not any(x in r.get('notes','').lower() for x in ['infrastructure','azure platform','no customer','not applicable','monitoring service','retired','no mcsb'])]
    ok=not bad and not no_url and len(uncov)<5
    if not ok: all_ok=False
    print(f'[{\"OK\" if ok else \"FAIL\"}] {s:<16} rows={len(rows):>3} no_url={len(no_url):>2} uncov={len(uncov):>3}')
print()
print('QUALITY GATE:','PASS' if all_ok else 'FAIL')"
